content.problemStatement:
You are playing EVE Online. Initially, you have one dollar, but you have somehow acquired two cheat codes. The first cheat code multiplies the amount of money you own by 101010, while the second one multiplies it by 202020. The cheat codes can be used any number of times.

You want to have exactly NNN dollars. Now you are wondering: can you achieve that by only using some sequence of cheat codes?
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing the string `"Yes"` if you can make exactly NNN dollars or `"No"` otherwise.
